IT Support Technician Job at First Bank of Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        First Bank of Nigeria Limited (FirstBank) is Nigeria's largest financial services institution by total assets and gross earnings. With more than 10 million customer accounts, FirstBank has over 750 branches providing a comprehensive range of retail and corporate financial services. The Bank has international presence through its subsidiaries, FBN Bank (UK) Limited in London and Paris, FBNBank DRC, FBNBank Ghana, FBNBank Gambia, FBNBank Guinea, FBNBank Sierra-Leone and FBNBank Senegal, as well as its Representative Offices in Johannesburg, Beijing and Abu Dhabi.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Support Technician
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full time
Career level: Junior role

Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related field.
	2–3 years of IT/software development or support experience.
	Strong foundation in programming, databases, or IT support.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Area Sales Manager - Medical",
  "description": "Pharma Ethics Limited is transnational pharmaceutical company based in Nigeria with its future plans to spread its activities in entire West Africa and India. We are one of the fastest growing Pharmaceutical Company focusing in the area of ethical medicines.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Area Sales Manager - Medical

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) ,
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are seeking experienced and result-driven professionals to fill the position of Area Sales Manager (Medical) for&nbsp; Abuja territory.


Responsibilities


	Drive sales growth and achieve business targets within assigned territory
	Manage, supervise, and motivate Medical Sales Representatives
	Develop and implement strategic sales plans
	Build and maintain strong relationships with healthcare professionals, hospitals, pharmacies, and distributors
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and business opportunities
	Prepare periodic sales reports and territory performance analysis
	Ensure effective coverage and customer engagement across assigned locations


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Pharmacy, Life Science, or a related field (MBA is an added advantage)
	5 - 7 years of experience in pharmaceutical industry (Mandatory)
	Previous experience as an Area Sales Manager or in a supervisory sales role is and added advantage.
	Strong leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills
	Excellent negotiation and relationship management abilites
	Good knowledge of pharmaceutical sales operations and territory management


Key Competencies:


	Leadership &amp; Team Management
	Strategic Thinking &amp; Execution
	Customer Relationship Management
	Market Intelligence &amp; Business Insight
	Results-Oriented &amp; Target-Driven.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and performance-based incentives
	Career growth opportunites
	Supportive and professional work environment
	Pension, Leave Allowance and other benefits.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr@pharmaethics.com using &nbsp;&#39;&#39;Area Sales Manager - Abuja &#39;&#39; as the subject of the email.",

Area Sales Manager - Medical Job at Pharma Ethics Limited




        
    

        
        Pharma Ethics Limited is transnational pharmaceutical company based in Nigeria with its future plans to spread its activities in entire West Africa and India. We are one of the fastest growing Pharmaceutical Company focusing in the area of ethical medicines.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Area Sales Manager - Medical

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) ,
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are seeking experienced and result-driven professionals to fill the position of Area Sales Manager (Medical) for  Abuja territory.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Drive sales growth and achieve business targets within assigned territory
	Manage, supervise, and motivate Medical Sales Representatives
	Develop and implement strategic sales plans
	Build and maintain strong relationships with healthcare professionals, hospitals, pharmacies, and distributors
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and business opportunities
	Prepare periodic sales reports and territory performance analysis
	Ensure effective coverage and customer engagement across assigned locations


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Pharmacy, Life Science, or a related field (MBA is an added advantage)
	5 - 7 years of experience in pharmaceutical industry (Mandatory)
	Previous experience as an Area Sales Manager or in a supervisory sales role is and added advantage.
	Strong leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills
	Excellent negotiation and relationship management abilites
	Good knowledge of pharmaceutical sales operations and territory management


Key Competencies:


	Leadership & Team Management
	Strategic Thinking & Execution
	Customer Relationship Management
	Market Intelligence & Business Insight
	Results-Oriented & Target-Driven.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and performance-based incentives
	Career growth opportunites
	Supportive and professional work environment
	Pension, Leave Allowance and other benefits.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using  ''Area Sales Manager - Abuja '' as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Ibifoundry Limited
content:
Ibifoundry Limited is a business services and digital strategy firm. The company specializes in several key professional areas: Business Systems: Designing and implementing structured operational frameworks for organizations, Digital Strategy: Developing online growth and marketing plans to enhance brand presence, Enterprise-Level Growth: Providing expert guidance on scaling businesses and improving overall enterprise performance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

1.)  Community Health Worker

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Helping people understand their health condition(s) and develop strategies to improve their health and well being
	Helping to build understanding and social capital to support healthier behaviors and lifestyle choices
	Delivering health information using culturally appropriate terms and concepts
	Linking people to health care/social service resources
	Providing informal counseling, support and follow-up as needed with patients


Requirements and skills


	Proven work experience as a Community Health Worker or similar role
	Experience working with people of different cultures and socio-economic backgrounds
	Understanding of the healthcare system and how to help patients find necessary resources


Salary
N120,000 - N250,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 25th June, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

2.) Duty Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Keep track of monthly, quarterly and yearly goals
	Work with management to assess and improve processes and policies
	Monitor and report on revenue and cash flow
	Uphold and enforce company policies
	Train new hires
	Address employee complaints or performance issues as needed
	Check in with employees regularly to determine satisfaction
	Schedule shifts
	Help management create the department’s budget
	Address customer issues and complaints
	Schedule regular maintenance and cleaning of facilities
	Meet regularly with upper management to stay informed on company issues
	Oversee security of the facility


Requirements and skills


	Work experience as a Duty Manager or similar management role
	Previous experience in the industry preferred
	Customer service experience
	Knowledge of cash management and bookkeeping procedures
	Team management skills
	Strong organizational skills
	Experience with facilities maintenance and/or security
	Strong problem-solving skills
	Availability to work in shifts including weekends.


Salary
N120,000 - N250,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 25th June, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

3.) Corporate Accountant

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Gather financial data and ledgers
	Consolidate and analyze financial statements and results
	Prepare budgets and monitor expenditures
	Handle monthly, quarterly and annual closings
	Manage periodical reporting
	Oversee external and internal audits
	Analyze finances to determine risks and create forecasts
	Advise management on how to craft effective business plans and resolve cost-related issues
	Supervise Junior Accountant.


Requirements and skills


	BSc/BA in Accounting, Finance or related field; professional certification (e.g. CPA) is a plus
	Proven experience as a Corporate Accountant
	Excellent knowledge of accounting regulations and practices
	In-depth experience in risk analysis, budgeting and forecasting
	Proficient in MS Office (especially Excel) and finance software
	An analytical mind with problem-solving aptitude
	Excellent communication skills
	Keen eye for detail
	Organizational and leadership skills.


Salary
N150,000 - N250,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 8th June, 2026. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Male Office Assistant Job at R & R Recruiting Services
content:
R & R Recruiting Services is a Recruitment Agency, Training, Consulting & Human Resources Management Company.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Male Office Assistant

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Assist with daily office operations and administrative tasks.
	Handle filing, documentation, and record keeping.
	Run office errands and support staff when needed.
	Maintain cleanliness and organization of the office environment.
	Attend to visitors and assist with basic office coordination.


Requirements
Qualification:


	Minimum of an SSCE.


Other Requirements:


	Must be organized and hardworking.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to follow instructions and work efficiently.


Benefits
N100,000 monthly salary

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more information WhatsApp: 09035411252.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Accuinfra Technology
content:
Accuinfra Technology is an IT Infrastructure Development company with a team over 10 years experience in the Security Systems Industry. We provide full Infrastructure Solutions between Sites using Fiber, Radio and on premise Data Centre establishment. Our Services like SaaS (Software As A Service), IaaS (Infrastructure As A Service) are designed in view of Customer to reduce cost and provide high availability of services. 2.) ERP Implementation Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Job Description


	As an ERP Implementer, you will take a major role in the deployment and optimization of ERP system to enhance operational efficiencies.
	Responsibilities include analyzing business needs, configuring ERP solutions, and ensuring seamless integration and adoption across departments.
	This role demands strong technical acumen and effective collaboration skills.


Responsiblities


	Analysis of business requirements 
	Characterization and definition of business processes, reports, workflows, interfaces and more
	Work process improvement. 
	System testing 
	System implementation 
	Managing system permissions and configurations
	Support users from all company departments. 
	User trainings 
	Priority support


Required Skills and Qualifications


	Sound functional knowledge of ERP Products.  
	Hands-on experience of managing projects such as implementation of ERP or similar migration projects;  
	Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills to work with diverse teams.
	Proficiency in tools such as MS Office, MS Project, Jira, or similar project management software.
	Ability to work both independently and as part of a team in an Agile development environment.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills; be able to communicate effectively at all levels of the Institution, including with senior management;
	Ability to handle changing priorities, deal with ambiguity and use good judgment in stressful situations;
	Ability to take on-time decisions even in the face of complexity, balancing systematic analysis with decisiveness. 


Application Closing Date: 7th June, 2026.
